title: CE AI Lab - Kubernetes Realtime View (Flux)

targets.query: from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "nodes_ready_pct") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: last)
from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "nodes_total") |> last()

n = from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "nodes_total") |> last()
p = from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "nodes_ready_pct") |> last()
join(tables: {n: n, p: p}, on: ["_time", "host"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, host: r.host, _field: "nodes_ready", _value: int(v: r._value_n * r._value_p / 100.0) }))
from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "pods_total") |> last()
from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "pods_failed_pending") |> last()
from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "stuck_pv_count") |> last()
from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and r._field == "nodes_ready_pct") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: last)

from(bucket: "kube_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "k8s_cluster_health" and (r._field == "pods_total" or r._field == "pods_failed_pending")) |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: last)

description: Kubernetes cluster monitoring. Raw counters pushed by monitor_k3s_health.sh, Flux/InfluxDB stores the data.
